glosses.en: just as; in the same way
glosses.fr: tout aussi; de la même manière
glosses.hi: बिल्कुल उसी तरह; ठीक वैसे ही
glosses.id: sama persis; dengan cara yang sama
glosses.ja: 同じように; まさにそのとおり

sentences.target: Ich mache das genauso wie du.

translations.de: Ich mache das genauso wie du.
translations.en: I do it just like you.
translations.ru: Я делаю это так же, как ты.
translations.he: אני עושה את זה בדיוק כמוך.
translations.nl: Ik doe het net als jij.
translations.uk: Я роблю це так само, як ти.
translations.hi: मैं यह बिल्कुल तुम्हारी तरह करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Robię to tak samo jak ty.
translations.nb: Jeg gjør det akkurat som deg.
translations.sv: Jag gör det precis som du.
translations.cs: Dělám to úplně stejně jako ty.
translations.ja: あなたと同じようにやる。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present tense (1sg), expressing the action.
Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the direct object.
Adverb marking equality in a comparison (pairs with 'wie').
Comparative subordinator introducing the standard of comparison.
2nd-person singular nominative personal pronoun; comparee in the equality construction.

sentences.target: Das schmeckt genauso gut wie gestern.

translations.de: Das schmeckt genauso gut wie gestern.
translations.en: It tastes just as good as yesterday.
translations.nl: Het smaakt net zo goed als gisteren.
translations.uk: На смак так само добре, як учора.
translations.hi: यह कल जितना ही स्वादिष्ट है.
translations.pl: Smakuje tak samo dobrze jak wczoraj.
translations.el: Είναι το ίδιο νόστιμο όπως χθες.
translations.nb: Det smaker like godt som i går.
translations.sv: Det smakar lika gott som igår.
translations.ro: E la fel de bun ca ieri.
translations.da: Det smager lige så godt som i går.
translations.fi: Se maistuu yhtä hyvältä kuin eilen.
translations.ja: 昨日と同じくらいおいしい。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun serving as the subject.
Finite main verb in present tense (3sg), sensory predicate.
Adverb indicating equality in the comparison.
Predicate adjective specifying quality; complement of 'schmeckt'.
Comparative subordinator introducing the comparator.
Temporal adverb serving as the standard of comparison ('like yesterday').

sentences.target: Sie sieht genauso aus wie ihre Mutter.
sentences.reading: /ziː ziːt ɡəˈnaʊ̯zoː aʊ̯s viː ˈiːʁə ˈmʊtɐ/

translations.de: Sie sieht genauso aus wie ihre Mutter.
translations.ipa: /ziː ziːt ɡəˈnaʊ̯zoː aʊ̯s viː ˈiːʁə ˈmʊtɐ/
translations.en: She looks just like her mother.
translations.zh-Hans: 她看起来跟她妈妈很像。
translations.yue: 佢同佢阿媽好似一個樣。
translations.ru: Она выглядит так же, как её мать.
translations.pt: Ela se parece com a mãe dela.
translations.he: היא נראית בדיוק כמו אמא שלה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy trông giống hệt mẹ mình.
translations.uk: Вона виглядає так само, як її мама.
translations.hu: Pont úgy néz ki, mint az anyja.
translations.hi: वह अपनी माँ जैसी ही दिखती है.
translations.pl: Wygląda tak samo jak jej matka.
translations.el: Μοιάζει ακριβώς με τη μητέρα της.
translations.sv: Hon ser precis ut som sin mamma.
translations.ja: 彼女は母親にそっくりだ。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite main verb in present tense (3sg); part of separable verb 'aussehen'.
Adverb marking equality in the comparison.
Separable verbal particle completing 'aussehen'; linked to the verb.
Comparative subordinator introducing the standard of comparison.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Mutter'.
Noun; head of the noun phrase serving as the comparator after 'wie'.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder arbeitet genauso viel wie ich.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tət ɡəˈnaʊ̯zoː fiːl viː ɪç/

translations.de: Mein Bruder arbeitet genauso viel wie ich.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tət ɡəˈnaʊ̯zoː fiːl viː ɪç/
translations.en: My brother works just as much as I do.
translations.es: Mi hermano trabaja tanto como yo.
translations.fr: Mon frère travaille autant que moi.
translations.it: Mio fratello lavora tanto quanto me.
translations.zh-Hans: 我哥哥工作得和我一样多。
translations.yue: 我哥哥做嘢同我一樣多。
translations.ru: Мой брат работает столько же, сколько и я.
translations.pt: Meu irmão trabalha tanto quanto eu.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi làm việc nhiều như tôi.
translations.ar: أخي يعمل بقدر ما أعمل أنا.
translations.nl: Mijn broer werkt evenveel als ik.
translations.uk: Мій брат працює стільки ж, скільки і я.
translations.hu: A bátyám ugyanannyit dolgozik, mint én.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई उतना ही काम करता है जितना मैं करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Mój brat pracuje tyle samo co ja.
translations.el: Ο αδερφός μου δουλεύει όσο κι εγώ.
translations.nb: Broren min jobber like mye som meg.
translations.id: Kakak saya bekerja sama banyaknya dengan saya.
translations.sv: Min bror jobbar lika mycket som jag.
translations.ro: Fratele meu muncește la fel de mult ca mine.
translations.cs: Můj bratr pracuje stejně jako já.
translations.da: Min bror arbejder lige så meget som mig.
translations.fi: Veljeni tekee töitä yhtä paljon kuin minä.
translations.ja: 兄は私と同じくらい働いている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Bruder'.
Noun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present tense (3sg), describing the action.
Adverb of equality marking the comparison.
Degree/quantity adverb modifying 'arbeitet'; part of the equality focus 'genauso viel'.
Comparative subordinator introducing the comparee.
1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun; standard of comparison.

app_payload.word_id: sama persis; dengan cara yang sama
app_payload.word_ja: 同じように; まさにそのとおり
jp: Ich mache das genauso wie du.
Das schmeckt genauso gut wie gestern.
Sie sieht genauso aus wie ihre Mutter.
Mein Bruder arbeitet genauso viel wie ich.
fu: /ziː ziːt ɡəˈnaʊ̯zoː aʊ̯s viː ˈiːʁə ˈmʊtɐ/
/maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tət ɡəˈnaʊ̯zoː fiːl viː ɪç/
de: Ich mache das genauso wie du.
Das schmeckt genauso gut wie gestern.
Sie sieht genauso aus wie ihre Mutter.
Mein Bruder arbeitet genauso viel wie ich.
ipa: /ziː ziːt ɡəˈnaʊ̯zoː aʊ̯s viː ˈiːʁə ˈmʊtɐ/
/maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tət ɡəˈnaʊ̯zoː fiːl viː ɪç/
en: I do it just like you.
It tastes just as good as yesterday.
She looks just like her mother.
My brother works just as much as I do.
